de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class PositionedLabeledString

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.PositionedString
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.PositionedLabeledString

  • public class PositionedLabeledString
extends PositionedString
    A positionedString with labels, which can then be passed over to the translated term. For the moment, this is used to distinguish implicit specifications from explicit ones and '&' from '&&' (logical and shortcut 'and') as well as '|' from '||' (logical and shortcut 'or'). Cf. TermImpl and LabeledTermImpl.
    Author:
    Michael Kirsten
